_comment: PASSTHROUGH preset: source PDFs render unaltered. Embedded raster blobs are stripped (saves ~5 MB and a lot of parse cost), and a global stroke-width override thins the natural CAD walls so they don't dominate. The cream `<rect>` background blends with the canvas surround. Per-floor `offset_x` / `offset_y` / `scale` align floors that the CAD designer drew at slightly different page positions — start at 0/0/1 and tweak from the inspector or directly in this JSON until floors stack cleanly.
